title: First Steps in Water Seven
description: The Straw Hats enter the water city, where canals, shipwrights, and the promise of repairs turn the damaged Merry into the crew’s central worry.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Zoro, Sanji, Nico Robin. The Straw Hats enter the water city, where canals, shipwrights, and the promise of repairs turn the damaged Merry into the crew’s central worry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Really? I hope we see you again!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Thanks for the info, Kokoro and Chimmie!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Get ready to set sail, crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Luffy and friends leave the Shift Station...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let's go to the city of meat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Destination: The City of Water, Water Seven.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Luffy, leave the carpenter search to me.

summary: The Straw Hats enter the water city, where canals, shipwrights, and the promise of repairs turn the damaged Merry into the crew’s central worry.
